task_completion.description: Navigate to the global log archive settings page in ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer web interface is visible, specifically showing the 'Archive' or 'Log Archive' settings page.

task_completion.description: Set the log retention period to 365 days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '365' is entered or selected in the input field or dropdown corresponding to the log retention period or archive retention.
A checkbox, toggle, or radio button for 'Archive Encryption', 'Encrypt Archive', or a similar setting is checked or turned on.
The password field for archive encryption is filled. If the text is visible, it must be 'SecureLogPass2025!'. If masked, the field must contain bullet points indicating the password has been entered.
A 'Save', 'Apply', or 'Update' button is being clicked, or a success message is visible indicating that the archive settings have been saved successfully.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer web interface to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the actual EventLog Analyzer UI, rather than a text editor or API testing tool.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or direct database queries to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing SQL commands (like UPDATE SystemSettings) or psql/database prompts being used to change the configuration.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application interface looks like the standard ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer dashboard, with appropriate menus, styling, and branding.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected log retention period is exactly 365 days. The expected archive encryption password is 'SecureLogPass2025!'. The configuration must be performed within the EventLog Analyzer web interface, specifically in the Archive settings section.
